results.title: TOTE Services Awarded VCM Contract to Oversee Medium Landing Ship Construction Program
results.description: Award brings TOTE Services' proven Vessel Construction Manager experience to a mission-critical U.S. Navy and Marine Corps shipbuilding program

results.title: Analyst expects $600-800 Project Helix and PS6 prices, as RAM costs ease before release
results.description: Prices for upcoming Xbox and PlayStation hardware may be more affordable than anticipated. One analysis believes that RAM costs will improve in time for the Project Helix and PS6 release dates. The new gaming systems will be vital to turn around the decline in console sales.

results.title: Why Is the ASX 200 (ASX:XJO) Set to Fall as Oil Jumps? (14 July 2026)
results.description: The ASX 200 faces a softer open as rising oil prices, Middle East tensions, higher yields and a semiconductor sell-off pressure sentiment.

results.title: Wider mix of expenses makes it harder for parents to plan and absorb school costs, survey says
results.description: Primary school parents told the Irish League of Credit Unions they expect to spend €1,607 across the school year, while post-primary school parents expect to spend €2,142

results.title: ‘Go again’: Conor McGregor teases ‘final fight of contract’, makes surgery reveal as injury mystery remains
results.description: For better or worse, Conor McGregor did get paid on Sunday (AEST).
